violations.text: Opened Deli Meat packages was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/19/2024

The condensate from the ice cream freezer refrigeration was observed with an excess of ice build up. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 11/26/2024
The tile coving by in the bakery by the walk in freezer is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2025
